TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Thurl_Bailey, title = Thurl_Bailey, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thurl_Bailey} }

S.FORM: Thurl Bailey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1961, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Thurl Bailey, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Thurl Bailey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1961, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 4, Thurl Bailey, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tħurl βailej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tħurl βailej, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
